file_insights.purpose: Complete CRUD API router for content management
key_features: GET / - List content with optional filtering by status, content_type, and channel
POST /{content_id}/status - Transition content status with validation
patterns: Proper HTTP status codes (201 for create, 204 for delete, 404 for missing)

file_insights.purpose: FastAPI application initialization with middleware and lifespan
key_features: All 6 API routers included with appropriate prefixes and tags

file_insights.purpose: Stub router implementations for future features
file_insights.status: Placeholder endpoints with consistent stub responses

patterns_discovered.name: Router Modularization
patterns_discovered.description: Each API domain (content, generation, validation, etc.) has its own router module for clean separation of concerns

patterns_discovered.name: Service Layer Abstraction
patterns_discovered.description: ContentService handles all business logic, routers focus only on request/response handling
patterns_discovered.example: ContentService for CRUD operations, parameter building, and status transitions

patterns_discovered.name: Dependency Injection
patterns_discovered.description: SessionDep dependency used consistently across all endpoints for database access

patterns_discovered.name: Response Transformation
patterns_discovered.description: _to_response helper function converts ORM objects to response schemas

patterns_discovered.name: Stub Pattern
patterns_discovered.benefit: Clear API contract for future implementation

patterns_discovered.name: Middleware Configuration
patterns_discovered.description: CORS middleware with explicit allow_origins, allow_credentials, and wildcard methods/headers

gotchas_discovered.description: channels field stored as JSON string requires json.loads() deserialization
gotchas_discovered.impact: Must handle JSON conversion in response transformation

gotchas_discovered.description: All endpoints defined as async but behavior depends on whether ServiceLayer methods are truly async
gotchas_discovered.impact: If service methods are synchronous, may cause blocking

gotchas_discovered.description: DELETE endpoint returns 204 with no response body - client must not expect response
gotchas_discovered.impact: Frontend developers must handle this status code appropriately

gotchas_discovered.description: Catches ValueError from service but assumes specific error contract
gotchas_discovered.impact: If service raises different exception types, errors will not be handled properly

gotchas_discovered.description: CORS allows only localhost:5173, needs environment-based configuration
gotchas_discovered.impact: Production deployment will break for non-localhost origins

achievements: Successfully implemented complete content CRUD API with 7 endpoints
Established modular router architecture for extensibility
Implemented proper HTTP status codes and error handling
Created service layer abstraction for business logic
Set up FastAPI application with CORS and lifespan configuration
Provided 5 stub routers for future features with consistent patterns
approach_outcome.scope_completion: 100% - All required endpoints created (CRUD operations, version history, status transitions, and stub routers)

recommendations.recommendation: Move CORS allowed_origins to environment variables for environment-specific configuration
recommendations.rationale: Hardcoded localhost:5173 will not work in production or other environments

recommendations.recommendation: Add pagination parameters (skip, limit) to list_content endpoint
recommendations.rationale: ContentListResponse suggests pagination support but not implemented; large datasets could cause performance issues

recommendations.recommendation: Implement consistent error response schema across all endpoints
recommendations.rationale: Different error types should return structured error responses with consistent format
No auth mechanisms visible; all endpoints are publicly accessible

recommendations.recommendation: Implement stub endpoints following the same ContentService abstraction pattern
recommendations.rationale: Maintains consistency when stub features are developed

recommendations.recommendation: Add request logging middleware for debugging and monitoring
recommendations.rationale: No logging visible; important for troubleshooting in production

recommendations.recommendation: Add docstrings and examples to main.py for FastAPI auto-documentation
recommendations.rationale: FastAPI generates Swagger/ReDoc docs from docstrings
